objective: Implement the value-gated agent-goal-writer workflow so ambiguous goals are challenged, clarified, pre-spec gated, and only then written as OpenSpec.

spark-implementation.description: Catalog default for isolated low/medium implementation tasks within 128k context

implementation.description: Catalog implementation scenario for medium-risk refactor, integration, and test-suite work

spark-docs.description: Catalog low-risk docs/spec/markdown scenario within 128k context

review.description: Catalog review/audit/spec-validation scenario for medium/high risk validation

final-authority.description: Catalog final-authority scenario for architecture-level decisions and final authority work

nodes.objective: Update SKILL.md to define agent-goal-writer as a critical collaborator rather than an order-taker, add the value-gated workflow stages before OpenSpec scaffolding, document the Value Challenge Gate, constructive disagreement protocol, no-build option, smaller-scope option, proceed_with_assumptions path, and pre-spec quality rubric.

Add scripts/agent-goal-writer-workflow using only standard-library automation or a thin wrapper around it. Implement init, check, gate --pre-spec, and write-spec; create .writer-workflow artifacts; enforce blocked/pass/proceed_with_assumptions statuses; require explicit acknowledgement for proceed_with_assumptions; and return stable non-zero exit codes plus machine-readable status output.
nodes.scope: workflow helper CLI and local artifact templates

nodes.objective: Add script-level tests or fixture-driven checks for the workflow helper covering init artifact creation, blocked gates for missing success signal/no-build/non-goal/unresolved blocker questions, pass status for a complete spec kernel, proceed_with_assumptions failure without acknowledgement and success with acknowledgement, and write-spec failure before the gate passes. Run the repository's relevant deterministic validation if one is established by the implementation.
Update README.md to describe the new value-gated workflow helper and when to use it, then refresh source-manifest.json and update change-explainer.html if required by the changed OpenSpec sources.

Perform final validation of the implemented value-gated writer workflow against the OpenSpec change: confirm SKILL.md, script behavior, tests, README, source manifest, and decision-review explainer preserve the critical-collaborator, value challenge, pre-spec gate, and proceed_with_assumptions requirements. Do not archive unless explicitly instructed separately.
